infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Use Face ID or your device passcode to unlock sober-house records.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: SoberAI uses your calendar to add recovery meetings, sober house obligations, and accountability appointments you choose to save.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsWriteOnlyAccessUsageDescripti: SoberAI uses calendar access to create recovery meetings, sober house obligations, and accountability appointments at your request.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsFullAccessUsageDescription: SoberAI uses calendar access to create and update recovery meetings, service commitments, sober house obligations, and accountability appointments you choose to save.
infoPlist.NSRemindersUsageDescription: SoberAI uses reminders access only when needed to support recovery calendar items you choose to save.
infoPlist.NSRemindersFullAccessUsageDescription: SoberAI uses reminders access only when needed to support recovery calendar items you choose to save.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Sober AI uses your location while the app is open to show nearby meetings, estimate distance, and confirm arrival when you start attendance.
